description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push to branches matching branch-* and specific tags, and also allows calling with inputs. The workflow manages concurrent runs, canceling in-progress jobs when a new one starts. It defines three jobs: cpp-build, python-build, and upload-conda. The cpp-build job uses a shared workflow for C++ matrix builds with specified repository and inputs. The python-build job depends on cpp-build and uses a shared workflow for Python matrix builds. The upload-conda job depends on both previous jobs and uses a shared workflow for uploading packages to Conda.
